contents.text: {{"Hi " + 4.`1` + "," + newline + newline + "I'm following up on Invoice " + 4.`0` + " for $" + 4.`3` + ", which was due on " + 4.`4` + ". This invoice is now " + 8.days_overdue + " days overdue." + newline + newline + "Could you please provide an update on when we can expect payment?" + newline + newline + "Thank you," + newline + 1.sender_name + newline + 1.business_name}}
